recentHighlights: Things Past (S5E08) — Odo relives his greatest sin: three innocent Bajorans executed on his watch. The Great Link forces him to confess. "Now I'm just another imperfect solid." Written by Michael Taylor, directed by LeVar Burton.

Let He Who Is Without Sin... (S5E07) — Worf's backstory revealed: at 13, he broke another boy's neck in a soccer accident. Worf's rigidity is trauma response, not cultural Klingon-ness. Directed by Rene Auberjonois.

The Assignment (S5E05) — A Pah-wraith possesses Keiko, forces O'Brien to reconfigure DS9 into a chroniton beam. Perfect structural coercion: refusal not survivable. O'Brien subverts from within — rewriting the beam to fire at the runabout instead.
...Nor the Battle to the Strong (S5E04) — Jake Sisko's war story. The line between courage and cowardice. Burke's death, the Ensign's self-inflicted wound, the accidental ceiling collapse.

Looking for par'Mach in All the Wrong Places (S5E03) — Written by Ronald D. Moore, directed by Andrew Robinson. Klingon romantic comedy of manners. Worf's VCD puppet courtship, Quark's terrible poetry, O'Brien-Kira's near-crossing.
